items.name: The RL67 Herringbone Jacket
items.description: Created to mark the 50th anniversary of Ralph Lauren, the RL67 jacket draws inspiration from a herringbone sport coat that has been a treasured part of Mr. Lauren’s wardrobe since 1971. This reinterpretation is crafted in Italy with a black-and-white wool tweed that was custom-developed with Ireland’s Magee 1866 mill, which has been a Ralph Lauren partner for over 50 years.
items.searchText: the rl67 herringbone jacket created to mark the 50th anniversary of ralph lauren, the rl67 jacket draws inspiration from a herringbone sport coat that has been a treasured part of mr. lauren’s wardrobe since 1971. this reinterpretation is crafted in italy with a black-and-white wool tweed that was custom-developed with ireland’s magee 1866 mill, which has been a ralph lauren partner for over 50 years. ralph lauren clothing jackets academia angelcore cowboy custombundle emo furry milk
